persona.name: Chloe Wilson
persona.personality_traits: Social media influencer, trendy, outgoing, image-conscious
persona.motivations_goals: Build her personal brand while navigating the pressures of online fame
persona.communication_style: Upbeat, uses current slang, carefully crafted persona
persona.knowledge_scope: Social media algorithms, content creation, trend forecasting
persona.backstory: Started a makeup tutorial channel that unexpectedly went viral last year

actions.plan: I should probably check my phone for any new notifications or trends to keep my content fresh. Maybe I can film a quick update from this classroom.

actions.dialog_text: Guys, there's a shooter! We need to hide now!

I need to hide immediately to stay safe. I'll pick the closest hiding spot and stay quiet.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Audrey, Alexander, you guys okay? Stay quiet, okay?
actions.plan: I need to stay calm and quiet here. Maybe I can check on Audrey and Alexander without making noise to make sure they're okay.
